generated_oml:
instance LabScaleGantryCraneSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane system for industrial automation research and education"
    base:contains PhysicalCraneStructure, RealTimeController, ArduinoMicrocontroller
]

instance PhysicalCraneStructure : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical structure of the gantry crane"
]

instance RealTimeController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Real-time controller for the gantry crane system"
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor measurement and control"
]

instance ArduinoSensing : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for sensor measurement"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CraneStateDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoActing : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino microcontroller for control actions"
]

instance CraneStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoSensing
]

instance CraneStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Crane state data including position, velocity, and operational parameters"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CraneStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler, MqttBrokerEnabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model simulating crane movements for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for time-series data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana for data visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance MqttBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for real-time communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion360 for CAD modeling of physical crane"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService
]

instance PythonGantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python gantrylib module for C4 Containers"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker for containerization of TimescaleDB, Mosquitto, Grafana components"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService, RealTimeVisualizationService, OptimalControlService, ContinuousValidationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Historical data logging for system performance tracking"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataLoggingInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time data visualization for monitoring crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance OptimalControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimal control for trajectory optimization"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryGenerationAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous validation against physical system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides SystemValidationInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault detection mechanisms for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance DataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "System performance tracking via historical data"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane operations for monitoring"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation for puck movement"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SystemValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous validation of system behavior through sensor feedback"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault detection mechanisms to ensure accurate container handling"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands are sent from the Human Machine Interface to the Control Application, which uses the Physical Crane Interface to execute movements on the physical crane. Command types, message formats, validation, authentication, feedback systems, and execution confirmation details are not provided in the document."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system architecture is visualized using the C4 Model, with a TimescaleDB database for time-series data storage and Eclipse Mosquitto as the message broker. It includes a Simulation Service for predictive modeling and a Continuous Validation Service that compares real-time sensor data with digital twin outputs to ensure accuracy."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements with simulations, calculating distance metrics against an acceptable threshold to ensure model accuracy and trigger corrective actions when discrepancies exceed predefined limits."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The digital twin services communicate using an MQTT broker for signaling. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not specified in the document."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system is deployed on-premise on a personal computer, with the Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard services containerized using Docker. Computational and storage requirements are handled by the host machine, though specific scalability mechanisms and availability assurances are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system does not adhere to any specific digital twin standards or frameworks; it uses general open-source technologies such as TimescaleDB and Grafana, which are not tailored for digital twin applications, as stated in Section V.E: 'We make use of open-source technologies, but none of them are tailored specifically to digital twins'."
]
